stemHtml: In case of a change to a flight plan submitted for an IFR flight, or a VFR flight operated as a controlled flight, what action must be taken?

options.a: Report the change to the relevant aerodrome authorities as soon as possible after landing.
options.b: Report the change as soon as practicable to the appropriate ATS unit.
options.c: Inform ATC only if it involves a change of flight rules.
options.d: Inform the briefing office at the aerodrome of arrival.
